source: Public PSA grading standards summary; interpreted conservatively. Not affiliated with or endorsed by PSA. Re-verify against PSA's current published standards before relying on these thresholds.
disclaimer: These thresholds are an internal, conservative interpretation used only to bound an ESTIMATE. Professional grading is subjective and performed in person.

centering.note: Front tolerances by grade, expressed as the max allowed off-center as 'larger/smaller'. Back tolerances are looser and applied separately.

gradeBands.label: Gem Mint
gradeBands.requires: Virtually perfect. Sharp corners, clean edges, no surface flaws, near-perfect centering.

gradeBands.label: Mint
gradeBands.requires: One minor flaw permitted (slight wax stain, minor print spot, or slight off-center).

gradeBands.label: NM-MT
gradeBands.requires: Minor wear: slight fraying at a corner, minor whitening, light scratch.

gradeBands.label: Near Mint
gradeBands.requires: Light surface wear, minor whitening on edges/corners.

gradeBands.label: EX
gradeBands.requires: Moderate wear, light scratching, corner wear.

defectCaps.note: A single serious defect caps the ceiling regardless of other strong sub-scores.
